subject: Re: quick question....
body:
nope


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, September 5, 2007 1:42:17 PM
Subject: FW: quick question....


 
 
From: Ellen Snibbe Baker [mailto:ellensnibbebaker@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, September 05, 2007 1:26 PM
To: Ellen Snibbe Baker
Subject: quick question....
 
 
 
Do you know this guy or this operation…I think it sounds like it would be a great job for me.  Many of the previous jobs have dried up.  But, this seems like a live one which would welcome my background.
 
I also know Bain Capital and Blackstone asset mgmt are looking for the same, but they can’t get over the hurdle of my strong personal rather than institutional contacts.  I just really need a little personal reference to push me over the edge.  What do you think??? Can you help??   Thanks  ESB
 
 
Allen FuchsPhone Number212-824-1500 (ext: 2506)
CompanySPG - Wealth Management Division (stands for Snow, Phipps, & Guggenheim)Fax Number 
Email Addressafuchs@spges.comDate PostedAug 27 2007
 
Job TitleInvestor Relations/Marketing Associate for Prestigious Investment Firm
CategoryInvestor Relations/Client Service
LocationNew York, NY
United States of America
 
DescriptionPrestigious multi-strategy hedge fund / private equity firm seeks Investor Relations/Marketing candidate to work with existing and new clients for new Private Equity business. We are looking for an IR/Marketing candidate to work with existing clients and develop and market new private equity funds to new institutional and high net worth clients. - Plan and coordinate road shows, annual portfolio reviews, requested pitch meetings. - Assist with development and maintenance of collateral materials including marketing presentations, product specific due-diligence questionnaires, offering memoranda and other materials used in all sales engagements. - Respond to ad hoc investor relations queries. - Interface with portfolio managers and senior management, providing client feedback on strategies and firm. - Distribute weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance information, responsible for prospect correspondence. - Plan and coordinate annual investor
 conference, including contract negotiation and execution. 
 
WILMINGTON, DE, FEBRUARY 1, 2006 . . . Hercules Incorporated (NYSE: HPC) today announced an agreement to sell a 51% interest in FiberVisions, L.L.C., ("FiberVisions"), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, to Snow, Phipps & Guggenheim, L. P., an affiliate of SPG Partners, LLC ("SPG"), a New York-based private equity firm

 
 

 
 
Ellen Snibbe Baker
55 East 87th St., 5M
New York, New York  10128
 
ellensnibbebaker@yahoo.com
 
646-682-9719
917-304-1652 cell
 
"The Future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams."  Eleanor Roosevelt

Subject: quick question....

 

 

 

Do you know this guy or this operation…I think it sounds like it would be a great job for me.  Many of the previous jobs have dried up.  But, this seems like a live one which would welcome my background.

 

I also know Bain Capital and Blackstone asset mgmt are looking for the same, but they can’t get over the hurdle of my strong personal rather than institutional contacts.  I just really need a little personal reference to push me over the edge.  What do you think??? Can you help??   Thanks  ESB

 

 

Allen Fuchs

Phone Number

212-824-1500 (ext: 2506)

Company

SPG - Wealth Management Division (stands for Snow, Phipps, & Guggenheim)

Fax Number

 

Email Address

afuchs@spges.com

Date Posted

Aug 27 2007

 

Job Title

Investor Relations/Marketing Associate for Prestigious Investment Firm

Category

Investor Relations/Client Service

Location

New York, NY
United States of America

 

Description

Prestigious multi-strategy hedge fund / private equity firm seeks Investor Relations/Marketing candidate to work with existing and new clients for new Private Equity business. We are looking for an IR/Marketing candidate to work with existing clients and develop and market new private equity funds to new institutional and high net worth clients. - Plan and coordinate road shows, annual portfolio reviews, requested pitch meetings. - Assist with development and maintenance of collateral materials including marketing presentations, product specific due-diligence questionnaires, offering memoranda and other materials used in all sales engagements. - Respond to ad hoc investor relations queries. - Interface with portfolio managers and senior management, providing client feedback on strategies and firm. - Distribute weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance information, responsible for prospect correspondence. - Plan and coordinate annual investor conference, including contract negotiation and execution.

 

WILMINGTON, DE, FEBRUARY 1, 2006 . . . Hercules Incorporated (NYSE: HPC) today announced an agreement to sell a 51% interest in FiberVisions, L.L.C., ("FiberVisions"), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, to Snow, Phipps & Guggenheim, L. P., an affiliate of SPG Partners, LLC ("SPG"), a New York-based private equity firm
